title: JS License Policy
description: License allowlist, denylist, and exceptions for npm dependencies. Mirrors deny.toml permissive rules.

exceptions.justification: Local workspace package loaded via file reference. Actual package is Apache-2.0.

Build-tool only, not linked into or distributed with runtime artifacts; mirrors deny.toml circuits exception. circomlib build-time dependencies. circuits/build.rs never invokes npm/node (only git clone/fetch of .circom sources), so node_modules is never populated in CI; deployments/scripts/package-circuits-source-bundle.sh additionally prunes any node_modules directory from the redistributed source bundle as a guarantee, in case node_modules exists on a machine running the script outside CI.

circomlib's .circom sources ARE compiled into shipped circuit artifacts (unlike the GPL-3.0 devDependency exception above, which is genuinely build-tool-only). LGPL-3.0's source-availability obligation for this linked component is satisfied via deployments/scripts/package-circuits-source-bundle.sh, which redistributes circomlib's source alongside the compiled dist/circuits/ artifacts; mirrors deny.toml circuits exception.

License field missing in package-lock.json for circomlib build-tool dependencies; resolved to Apache-2.0 via npm registry metadata at the locked version (verified with scripts/verify-exception-licenses.sh). See: https://www.npmjs.com/package/web-worker

License field missing in package-lock.json for circomlib build-tool dependencies; resolved to ISC via npm registry metadata at the locked version (b4a@1.5.3). Note: b4a relicensed to Apache-2.0 in later major versions, but the version pinned in this lockfile is ISC — verified with scripts/verify-exception-licenses.sh, which checks the locked version specifically rather than `latest` to avoid this exact class of error. See: https://www.npmjs.com/package/b4a

License field missing in package-lock.json for circomlib build-tool dependencies; resolved to BSD-2-Clause via npm registry metadata. The registry only exposes a generic "BSD" tag for this version (not a specific SPDX identifier); manually confirmed BSD-2-Clause by inspecting the bundled esprima.js license header (exactly the two BSD-2-Clause clauses, no advertising/endorsement clause) — see https://www.npmjs.com/package/esprima.
License field missing in package-lock.json for circomlib build-tool dependencies; resolved to BSD-3-Clause via npm registry metadata.
License field missing in package-lock.json for circomlib build-tool dependencies; resolved to ISC via npm registry metadata.
License field missing in package-lock.json for circomlib build-tool dependencies; resolved to MIT via npm registry metadata.
License field missing in package-lock.json for circomlib build-tool dependencies; resolved to Python-2.0 via npm registry metadata.
